description:
Advances: specled.config

Add SpecLedEx.Config that loads .spec/config.yml with defaults. Fields: test_tags.enabled (bool), test_tags.paths (list), test_tags.enforcement (:warning|:error). Uses yaml_elixir (already a dep). spec.init scaffolds default config file.

Touches:
- lib/specled_ex/config.ex (new)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.init.ex
- test/specled_ex/config_test.exs (new)

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Config unit tests pass (load valid YAML, missing file, malformed YAML, unknown enforcement, path filter)
- [ ] spec.init scaffolds config.yml
- [ ] mix spec.check passes for specled.config
- [ ] No existing tests broken
title: S1: Config module (.spec/config.yml)
